correlation_results.primary_attack_pattern: Phishing attacks leveraging compromised branding and deceptive URLs to steal user credentials, particularly targeting access to wallets and Web3 applications. The incidents also show a willingness to use domain manipulation and redirection to harvest user data.
affected_platforms: All wallets interacting with DPD or Instagram via web links
Any protocol reliant on user-initiated transactions
recommended_actions: Implement enhanced URL filtering and warning systems for users clicking links related to common phishing targets (e.g., delivery services, social media).
Deploy stricter monitoring for domain squatting and typosquatting related to popular Web3 brands and services.
Educate users about phishing risks, emphasizing the importance of verifying URLs and never entering seed phrases on unverified websites.
correlation_results.analyst_summary: Current indicators strongly suggest a coordinated phishing campaign targeting a wide range of users and platforms. The correlation with past incidents, particularly the Ronin Network Hack, demonstrates the significant financial risk posed by these attacks. DeFi protocols must immediately strengthen their security posture and user education to mitigate the current, critical threat.

documented_incidents.name: Ronin Network Hack
documented_incidents.description: Developer phished via fake job offer, private keys compromised

documented_incidents.name: Curve Finance DNS Hijack
documented_incidents.description: DNS records hijacked, users redirected to malicious frontend

documented_incidents.name: Ledger Connect Kit Supply Chain
documented_incidents.description: Malicious code injected into npm package used by DeFi frontends

documented_incidents.name: MyEtherWallet BGP Hijack
documented_incidents.description: BGP routing manipulation redirected traffic to attacker infrastructure

documented_incidents.name: Mixin Network Cloud Breach
documented_incidents.description: Cloud service provider database compromised, private keys exposed
